sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69712" key="naopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νᾱο-ποιέω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νᾱο-ποιία</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νᾱο-ποϊκός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νᾱο-ποιός</orth>, <sense id="n69712.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">νεω-ποιέω, -ποιία, -ποϊκός, -ποιός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
